governing_decisions.capacity_route: PV-CAP-001/D-014 capacity remains separate and unsigned until a signed capacity artifact exists
governing_decisions.orientation_scope: PV-ORIENT-001 statistical orientation/tilt classes only; no building/roof/3DBAG/PV-map extraction before the first experiment
governing_decisions.pv_param_decision_status: PV-PARAM-001 remains proposed/fail-closed; this packet proposes an amended choice layer only
governing_decisions.weather_basis: WEATHER-001 KNMI Q-derived ghi_w_per_m2 remains the realized irradiance path; PVGIS remains qualitative sanity/provenance only

input_dependencies.capacity_artifact: D014-PV-CAPACITY-APPROVAL-TEMPLATE successor must provide signed installed capacity and convention
input_dependencies.orientation_tilt_values: D014-PV-ORIENTATION-TILT-VALUE-CHOICE-PACKET or successor must be signed before executable class use
input_dependencies.scenario_consistency: A-016 mapping must align EV/HP/PV planning-year/scenario labels before executable integrated use
input_dependencies.weather_member_artifact: accepted D-004 WEATHER-001 source/member artifact required before component input use

non_claims: No PV conversion formula is approved by this packet.
No PR=0.86, direct-GHI, pvlib, plane-of-array, decomposition, albedo, temperature, clipping, or capacity-convention treatment is signed.

No PV capacity value, growth factor, orientation/tilt values, allocation, PV generation, net-load, event detection, P(E), threshold run, capacity screen, manuscript result, or final paired HP/PV acceptance is produced.
No roof, building, 3DBAG, or PV-map geometry workflow is implemented before the first experiment.

recommendation_for_pi_review.fallback_path: use direct_ghi_pr_scalar_candidate only if the PI signs it as an explicit first-screen simplification despite its missing geometry timing effects
recommendation_for_pi_review.keep_pvgis_boundary: PVGIS may calibrate or sanity-check seasonal/peak behavior, but must not become a realized sampled weather path
recommendation_for_pi_review.preferred_path: amend PV-PARAM-001 toward a signed statistical-orientation/tilt plane-of-array conversion route if it can be implemented with public, traceable model assumptions
